diagrams.title: FOL Syntax Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the structure of FOL from basic elements to complex formulas
diagrams.purpose: Understand building blocks of FOL syntax

diagrams.title: Quantifier Scope Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows how quantifiers bind variables in a formula
elements: Shadowing when inner quantifier repeats variable
diagrams.purpose: Visualize variable binding and scope rules

diagrams.title: Inference Rules Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows major inference rules with premises and conclusions
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for inference rule applications

diagrams.title: Forward vs Backward Chaining Flowchart
diagrams.description: Compares data-driven vs goal-driven inference approaches
elements: FC: Facts → Rules → New Facts → ... → Goal
FC is bottom-up, BC is top-down
FC responsive to data, BC focused on goal

visuals.title: Using First Order Logic
visuals.description: Visual diagram for using first order logic
